text.title: Content Atomization Engine Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Content Atomization Engine methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: ONE canonical asset feeds the chain. Multi-source atomization is forbidden — kills attribution.
rule.rationale: ONE canonical asset feeds the chain. Multi-source atomization is forbidden — kills attribution.

rule.statement: Each channel gets a specific transformation (length, format, hook, CTA). Verbatim repost forbidden.
rule.rationale: Each channel gets a specific transformation (length, format, hook, CTA). Verbatim repost forbidden.

rule.statement: Each atomized unit passes ai-content-quality-review (entity density, citations, original POV) BEFORE distribution.
rule.rationale: Each atomized unit passes ai-content-quality-review (entity density, citations, original POV) BEFORE distribution.

rule.statement: Spec names the single founder. 'team' / 'we' / '' forbidden.
rule.rationale: Spec names the single founder. 'team' / 'we' / '' forbidden.

rule.statement: Distribution log records per-channel timestamp + URL. Without log, performance attribution breaks.
rule.rationale: Distribution log records per-channel timestamp + URL. Without log, performance attribution breaks.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-content-atomization-engine.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
